fields.name: parentEntity
fields.description: Identifies the entity related to the cascade operation.

fields.name: rowCount
fields.description: The number of rows affected by the cascade operation.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Dependent entities
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity names that hold rows pointing to the parent

overridableConfigKeys.label: Enabled
overridableConfigKeys.description: Whether the cascade-on-delete gate is active for the host orbital. Off by default; turn on to cascade-delete dependent rows when the parent is deleted.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: enable, turn on, enforce, require, activate, apply, switch on, cascade delete, delete children, on delete cascade, cascade on delete, remove related, soft delete cascade, dependent deletes, integrity cascade

overridableConfigKeys.label: Foreign-key field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Field on dependent rows that holds the parent's id

overridableConfigKeys.label: Parent entity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity whose deletion triggers the cascade
